Templates

Evergreen landing pages for public digital packs

Each template page keeps a stable URL while pointing to the newest dated pack, download page, ZIP, listing copy, and voluntary support route.

June 05, 2026

Tiny Launch Checklist template

A compact launch checklist for publishing a small page, pack, or offer without waiting for perfect.

A simple worksheet for pricing a small digital or service offer without pretending the market is guaranteed.
